prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically addresses collection rates for Council Tax and non-domestic rates in England, which are subject to English legislation and administrative practices. Scotland operates under a different council tax framework, making it not applicable to that nation.
